content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Tree Distances II". Refer to LeetCode description: https://cses.fi/problemset/task/1133
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the number of nodes in the tree. Then, n-1 lines describe the edges of the tree. Each line contains two integers a and b, the nodes connected by an edge. After that, one line contains an integer k, the number of queries. Then, k lines describe the queries. Each line contains two integers a and b, the nodes for which we want to find the distance.
content.outputFormat: For each query, output the distance between the nodes a and b.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use a tree traversal algorithm (e.g., DFS or BFS) to find the distances between all pairs of nodes. Then, for each query, simply look up the distance between the nodes a and b.
